scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/sdk build && bun run --cwd packages/web build && bun run --cwd apps/cli build
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/core lint && bun run --cwd packages/sdk lint && bun run --cwd packages/web lint && bun run --cwd apps/cli lint
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/sdk test && bun run --cwd packages/web test && bun run --cwd apps/cli test
